text.tspan: SETUP: 1 hot cache key (homepage banner, top-N feed, JWT public key)
TTL just expired or cache flushed; key not present
u2022 cache TTLs often align (all set at deploy time, all expire together)
u2022 popular keys have many concurrent readers (it's WHY they're cached)
u2022 a cache outage u2192 ALL keys miss simultaneously

g.text: T0: 10,000 concurrent requests for the key arrive
T1: each one MISSes the cache
T2: each one starts a DB query
T3: 10,000 concurrent identical DB queries hit the DB

text.tspan: T4: DB collapses under the herd
u2192 even other queries (not for this key) time out
